series_metadata.series_description: These files contain consumer complaints, for consumer finance licensees filed with the Divison of Financial Institutions, as well as pertinent information and correspondence relating to the complaint where there is no referral to legal for further investigation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that papers copy has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years after the consumer complaint had been resolved or closed, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
